title: mitrephora sumatrana
intro: Mitrephora sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran mitrephora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Mitrephora sumatrana can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, with the leaves and roots typically being used to make a tea or added to other remedies.
